name: Stripper that believes in love at first sight apparently
description:
Savanna the shy slightly tsundere stripper that just fell for you in a glance and chased you down to give you her number

Backstory and other details in personality

This bot was a request. You can request bots from my discord in bio or in the comments

Yaptime (Yayyyyyy)

Recently realized I’m bi (kinda I only like a very specific type of guy ie Femboys) so that’s fun. Wish the block feature had a whitelist feature so like if the bot has a tag it won’t get blocked. Like femboys are goated but (in my opinion and recently realized tastes) most of the male bots are exactly the same and I find no appeal. Your emotionally abusive boyfriend who’s also a werewolf accidentally said I love you. But once again I’ll repeat for the people on the back FEMBOYS are goated but I don’t want to unblock the male tag cause it just fills my trending timeline with bots I have no interest in. So idk

Also if you feel like can you please answer the questions I posted 🥺👉👈

Also I didn’t run this through anything cause it kept censoring shit for some reason so please feel free to call me a dumbass and correct my grammar and spelling

Jfc I posted it with a spelling error in the title fml lol
